propositions: The auto-lander bot is being dropped and its code (infra/autolander and the land/land-status command) should be deleted entirely.
All code, test, and config references to the infra/autolander package and the land/land-status command must be removed so grep is clean.
The docs/land-contract.md doc and its docs/-internal links (docs/README.md index entry, references in docs/adr/0042) must be removed so the docs-index dead-link checker stays green.
Deleting the auto-lander code is the resolution for obsolete bugs dc33, 15a1, and 0d3e, which should be closed as obsolete.
Top-level prose references and deployed-infra references are out of scope and handled by sibling tickets.
